text: The ELS_Command code is carried in the first word of the Payload of the first frame of the Sequence, and the first byte of the Payload is the ELS_Command code.

evidence_refs.quote: or reply is composed of a single Sequence with the ELS_Command code being specified in the first
word of the Payload of the first frame of the Sequence.
The first byte of the Payload (ELS_Command code) of the request or reply Sequence shall be as

text: The TYPE field for ELS frames shall be set to 01h.

evidence_refs.quote: The TYPE field for ELS frames shall be set to 01h.

text: For ELS frames, R_CTL request uses information category 0010b and reply uses information category 0011b under routing 0010b.

evidence_refs.quote: The R_CTL shall be set as specified in table 2.

text: An ELS request and the corresponding reply shall be performed within a single Exchange.

evidence_refs.quote: An ELS request and the corresponding reply shall be performed within a single Exchange.
